dustryV2:4","name":"Software Development","$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.voyager.dash.deco.common.IndustryV2"],"$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.identity.profile.IndustryV2"},{"industryV2Taxonomy":{"*urn:li:fsd_industryV2:4":"urn:li:fsd_industryV2:4"},"description":"Every company has a mission. What's ours? To empower every person and every organization to achieve more. We believe technology can and should be a force for good and that meaningful innovation contributes to a brighter world in the future and today. Our culture doesn’t just encourage curiosity; it embraces it. Each day we make progress together by showing up as our authentic selves. We show up with a learn-it-all mentality. We show up cheering on others, knowing their success doesn't diminish our own. We show up every day open to learning our own biases, changing our behavior, and inviting in differences. Because impact matters. \n\nMicrosoft operates in 190 countries and is made up of approximately 228,000 passionate employees is the worldwide technology leader that is revolutionizing the way organizations connect and protect in the AI era. For more than 40 years, Cisco has securely connected the world. With its industry leading AI-powered solutions and services, Cisco enables its customers, partners and communities to unlock innovation, enhance productivity and strengthen digital resilience. With purpose at its core, Cisco remains committed to creating a more connected and inclusive future for all. is the Data and AI company. More than 20,000 organizations worldwide — including adidas, AT&T, Bayer, Block, Mastercard, Rivian, Unilever, and over 60% of the Fortune 500 — rely on Databricks to build and scale data and AI apps, analytics and agents. Headquartered in San Francisco with 30+ offices around the globe, Databricks offers a unified Data Intelligence Platform that includes Agent Bricks, Lakeflow, Lakehouse, Lakebase and Unity Catalog. \n\n---\nDatabricks applicants\n\nPlease apply through our official Careers page at databricks.com/company/careers. \n\nAll official communication from Databricks will come from email addresses ending with @databricks.com or @goodtime.io (our meeting tool).","*industryV2Taxonomy":["urn:li:fsd_industryV2:4"],"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.40e0141ab5a097caaa3fce0848b70191"],"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/company/databricks/","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.organization.Company","employeeCountRange":{"start":5001,"end":10000,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.86469c13590ec09e5d459a90dd74d3b0"],"$type":"com.linkedin.common.IntegerRange"},"industryV2":[],"entityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_company:3477522","headquarter":{"streetAddressOptOut":false,"address":{"country":"US","geographicArea":"CA","city":"San ":1773162000000,"height":33,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"},{"width":1128,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.604a153a925ba954bd5b1ae22b73ae36"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"10000/B4EZqTXlC1KoAU-/0/1763409023887/oracle_cover?e=1773162000&v=beta&t=WZNP9_W2z0-x21Q0cV4UENnrYLXQWBK_G6DkKj8aqq4","expiresAt":1773162000000,"height":191,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"}],"rootUrl":"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E1BAQFZakd86ihePg/company-background_","$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorImage"}},"*industry":["urn:li:fsd_industry:96"],"description":"We’re a cloud technology company that provides organizations around the world with computing infrastructure and software to help them innovate, unlock efficiencies and become more effective. We also created the world’s first – and only – autonomous database to help organize and secure our customers’ data.\n \nOracle Cloud Infrastructure offers higher performance, security, and cost savings. It is designed so businesses can move workloads easily from on-premises systems to the cloud, and between cloud and on-premises and other clouds. Oracle Cloud applications provide business leaders with modern applications that help them innovate, attain sustainable growth, and become more resilient. \n \nThe work we do is not only transforming the world of business--it's helping defend governments, and advance scientific and medical research. From nonprofits to companies of all sizes, millions of people use our tools to streamline supply chains, make HR more human, quickly pivot to a new financial plan, and connect data and people around the world. \n\nAt work, we embrace diversity, encourage personal and professional growth, and celebrate a global team of passionate people developing innovative technologies that help people and companies tackle real-world problems head-on.\n\nThis LinkedIn page serves as Oracle’s official global company presence, connecting our team, customers, and partners worldwide.\n\n\nIf you’d like to join us, please visit our Careers page: https://www.oracle.com/corporate/careers/\n\nFor investor news, SEC filings, and financial information about Oracle (NYSE:ORCL), please visit https://investor.oracle.com/home/.\n \nFollow us on X: x.com/oracle \nLike our page on Facebook: facebook.com/Oracle/ \nFollow us on Instagram: instagram.com/oracle/\n","*industryV2Taxonomy":["urn:li:fsd_industryV2:96"],"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.40e0141ab5a097caaa3fce0848b70191"],"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/company/oracle/","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.organization.Company","employeeCountRange":{"start":10001,"end":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.86469c13590ec09e5d459a90dd74d3b0"],"$type":"com.linkedin.common.IntegerRange"},"industryV2":[],"entityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_company:1028","headquarter":{"streetAddressOptOut":false,"address":{"country":"US","geographicArea":"Texas","city":"Austin","postalCode":"78741","line2":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.ba7a55dcae9c7be6b47ea446c81b19d1"],"line1":"2300 company has a mission. What's ours? To empower every person and every organization to achieve more. We believe technology can and should be a force for good and that meaningful innovation contributes to a brighter world in the future and today. Our culture doesn’t just encourage curiosity; it embraces it. Each day we make progress together by showing up as our authentic selves. We show up with a learn-it-all mentality. We show up cheering on others, knowing their success doesn't diminish our own. We show up every day open to learning our own biases, changing our behavior, and inviting in differences. Because impact matters. \n\nMicrosoft operates in 190 countries and is made up of approximately 228,000 passionate employees worldwide.","archived":false,"premiumUpsellEligible":false,"pageType":"COMPANY","affiliatedOrganizationsByShowcases":{"*elements":["urn:li:fsd_company:3603566","urn:li:fsd_company:71645756","urn:li:fsd_company:3627496","urn:li:fsd_company:99417441","urn:li:fsd_company:25050509","urn:li:fsd_company:3626505","urn:li:fsd_company:98815486","urn:li:fsd_company:28890237","urn:li:fsd_company:96667549","urn:li:fsd_company:99404601","urn:li:fsd_company:85932444","urn:li:fsd_company:3634496","urn:li:fsd_company:99402845","urn:li:fsd_company:71326020","urn:li:fsd_company:90633019","urn:li:fsd_company:3854876","urn:li:fsd_company:101839494","urn:li:fsd_company:18342761","urn:li:fsd_company:90632947","urn:li:fsd_company:64980219","urn:li:fsd_company:4998717","urn:li:fsd_company:16188386","urn:li:fsd_company:100698332","urn:li:fsd_company:110106003","urn:li:fsd_company:93455361","urn:li:fsd_company:3509297","urn:li:fsd_company:103842815","urn:li:fsd_company:68189297","urn:li:fsd_company:96411081","urn:li:fsd_company:79153021","urn:li:fsd_company:91099302","urn:li:fsd_company:10065572","urn:li:fsd_company:104144190","urn:li:fsd_company:3720664","urn:li:fsd_company:3509299","urn:li:fsd_company:107855954","urn:li:fsd_company:102844559","urn:li:fsd_company:38124216","urn:li:fsd_company:102149827","urn:li:fsd_company:104107263"],"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.68a8cf9d96ba7bf39a2e2590a4529342"],"$type":"com.linkedin.restli.common.CollectionResponse"},"entityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_company:1035","websiteUrl":"https://news.microsoft.com/","headquarter":{"streetAddressOptOut":false,"address":{"country":"US","geographicArea":"Washington","city":"Redmond","postalCode":"98052","line2":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.ba7a55dcae9c7be6b47ea446c81b19d1"],"line1":"1 care deeply about transforming lives with AMD technology to enrich our industry, our communities, and the world. Our mission is to build great products that accelerate next-generation computing experiences – the building blocks for the data center, artificial intelligence, PCs, gaming and embedded. Underpinning our mission is the AMD culture. We push the limits of innovation to solve the world’s most important challenges. We strive for execution excellence while being direct, humble, collaborative, and inclusive of diverse perspectives. \nAMD together we advance_ ":196,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"},{"width":400,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.604a153a925ba954bd5b1ae22b73ae36"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"400/company-background_400/0/1681945878685/amazon_cover?e=1773162000&v=beta&t=gaFcQkza3Lkw_orufyqeL-sgGnk1vEpNyLI9mmrFS38","expiresAt":1773162000000,"height":68,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"},{"width":200,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.604a153a925ba954bd5b1ae22b73ae36"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"200/company-background_200/0/1681945878685/amazon_cover?e=1773162000&v=beta&t=Duc9oDMWR3jyhekeaTGXGV43nott8sfUSLod8rVbADk","expiresAt":1773162000000,"height":34,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"}],"rootUrl":"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4D1BAQFUuv-N9Osg6A/company-background_","$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorImage"}},"*industry":["urn:li:fsd_industry:4"],"description":"Amazon is guided by four principles: customer obsession rather than competitor focus, passion for invention, commitment to operational excellence, and long-term thinking. We are driven by the excitement of building technologies, inventing products, and providing services that change lives. We embrace new ways of doing things, make decisions quickly, and are not afraid to fail. We have the scope and capabilities of a large company, and the spirit and heart of a small one.\n\nTogether, Amazonians research and develop new technologies from Amazon Web Services to Alexa on behalf of our customers: shoppers, sellers, content creators, and developers around the world.\n\nOur mission is to be Earth's most customer-centric company. Our actions, goals, projects, programs, and inventions begin and end with the customer top of mind.\n\nYou'll also hear us say that at Amazon, it's always \"Day 1.\"​ What do we mean? That our approach remains the same as it was on Amazon's very first day - to make smart, fast decisions, stay nimble, invent, and focus on delighting our customers.","*industryV2Taxonomy":["urn:li:fsd_industryV2:4"],"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.40e0141ab5a097caaa3fce0848b70191"],"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/company/amazon/","$type":"com.linkedin.voyager.dash.organization.Company","employeeCountRange":{"start":10001,"end":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.86469c13590ec09e5d459a90dd74d3b0"],"$type":"com.linkedin.common.IntegerRange"},"industryV2":[],"entityUrn":"urn:li:fsd_company:1586","headquarter":{"streetAddressOptOut":false,"address":{"country":"US","geographicArea":"WA","city":"Seattle","postalCode":"98109","line2":null,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.ba7a55dcae9c7be6b47ea446c81b19d1"],"line1":"2127 in 2003, LinkedIn connects the world's professionals to make them more productive and successful. With more than 1 billion members worldwide, including executives from every Fortune 500 company, LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network. The company has a diversified business model with revenue coming from Talent Solutions, Marketing Solutions, Sales Solutions and Premium Subscriptions products. 925ba954bd5b1ae22b73ae36"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"200/B4EZqXwOLQGoAg-/0/1763482592417/googledeepmind_cover?e=1773162000&v=beta&t=jsEzoaYt2zxVJSV0yQzluVQKjMjUUyFNNA5HR14WEsc","expiresAt":1773162000000,"height":33,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"},{"width":2256,"$recipeTypes":["com.linkedin.604a153a925ba954bd5b1ae22b73ae36"],"fileIdentifyingUrlPathSegment":"10000/B4EZqXwOLQGoAY-/0/1763482592417/googledeepmind_cover?e=1773162000&v=beta&t=kUSWMxBgVdj3pH34eQvbdOZbSdAB2PpA7c8o6kcUH1w","expiresAt":1773162000000,"height":380,"$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorArtifact"}],"rootUrl":"https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/D4E1BAQFAgpTW62kjXQ/company-background_","$type":"com.linkedin.common.VectorImage"}},"*industry":["urn:li:fsd_industry:70"],"description":"We’re a team of scientists, engineers, machine learning experts and more, working together to advance the state of the art in artificial intelligence. We use our technologies for widespread public benefit and scientific discovery, and collaborate with others on critical challenges, ensuring safety and ethics are the highest priority.\n\nOur long term aim is to solve intelligence, developing more general and capable problem-solving systems, known as artificial general intelligence (AGI). \n\nGuided by safety and ethics, this invention could help society find answers to some of the world’s most pressing and fundamental scientific challenges.\n \nWe have a track record of breakthroughs in fundamental AI research, published in journals like Nature, Science, and more.Our programs have learned to diagnose eye diseases as effectively as the world’s top doctors, to save 30% of the energy used to keep data centres cool, and to predict the complex 3D shapes of proteins - which could one day transform how drugs are local control. Satya NadellaSatya Nadella • FollowingInfluencer • Following Chairman and CEO at MicrosoftChairman and CEO at Microsoft 1w • 1 week ago • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn
We’re building the most comprehensive digital sovereignty platform to help countries and organizations meet their regulatory, security, and operational needs.

Today in London, we announced new capabilities across Microsoft Sovereign Cloud that enable customers to bring core productivity workloads and AI models into fully disconnected sovereign environments, with more choice and greater local control.
